title: The Rolling Stones: From the Vault - Sticky Fingers Live at the Fonda Theatre 2015
original_title: The Rolling Stones: From the Vault - Sticky Fingers Live at the Fonda Theatre 2015
overview: The Rolling Stones kicked off their 2015 North American tour at the Fonda Theatre where they performed the entire Sticky Fingers album.
